title: polypodium lineare var. simplex
intro: Polypodium lineare var. simplex is a variety of the Polypodium lineare plant, which belongs to the polypodiaceae family of ferns. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polypodium lineare var. simplex include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
